infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photos to let you lock and encrypt them in the secure vault.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save encrypted media to your library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to the camera to take secure photos directly into the vault.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you hide them securely.
Allow app to access and hide your media files.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow app to save your encrypted media.
